policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-17 - Audit for latest version of application framework'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-17 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Site Linux Tomcat version
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the usage of older or outdated Tomcat versions. Periodically, newer versions are released for Tomcat software either due to security flaws or to include additional functionality. Using the latest Tomcat version for App Service apps is recommended in order to take advantage of security fixes and/or new functionalities. This policy only applies to Linux apps and requires the usage of a specfic Tomcat version.

drcp.name: AppServiceSiteLinuxTomcatVersion
drcp.controlDesc: Audit for enabling of remote debugging

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
Specify the supported Tomcat versions for Linux App Service.
